scripts.dev: corepack pnpm --filter @learning-hub/shared build && corepack pnpm -r --parallel --filter @learning-hub/server --filter @learning-hub/web dev
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @learning-hub/shared build && corepack pnpm -r --workspace-concurrency=1 test
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @learning-hub/shared build && corepack pnpm -r --workspace-concurrency=1 typecheck
